---
title: "IC2S2 2025 parallel talk accepted"
date: 2025-04-18
description: "Parallel Talk. Using causal inference to unmask racial discrimination in traffic enforcement via proxies has been accepted for IC2S2 2025 in Norrkoping, Sweden."
categories:
  - talks
  - policing
---

My work, _"Using Causal Inference to Unmask Racial Discrimination in Traffic Enforcement via Proxies,"_ has been accepted for a parallel talk at the International Computational Social Science Conference (IC2S2) 2025 in Norrkoping, Sweden.
